translations.A watch rule for this folder already exi: Bu jild uchun kuzatuv qoidasi allaqachon mavjud
translations.Threshold must be between 1 and %s days: Chegara 1 va %s kun oralig'ida bo'lishi kerak
translations.No new files have been uploaded to %1$s: %2$s dan beri %1$s ga yangi fayllar yuklanmadi.
Ushbu qoida yaratilganidan beri (hech qachon aniqlanmagan) %1$s ga yangi fayllar yuklanmadi.
translations.Watched folder %1$s no longer exists. Yo: Kuzatilayotgan %1$s papkasi endi mavjud emas. Ushbu kuzatish qoidasini olib tashlashingiz mumkin.
translations.Monitor directories for upload inactivit: Yuklash faolsizligi uchun kataloglarni kuzatib boring
translations.Monitor directories for file upload inac: Fayllarni yuklashdagi faolsizliklar uchun kataloglarni kuzatib boring va belgilangan vaqt ichida yangi fayllar yuklanmaganida bildirishnomalarni oling.
translations.Failed to load watch rules: Kuzatuv qoidalarini yuklashda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Provide a valid folder and threshold: Yaroqli papka va chegara qiymatini kiriting
translations.Failed to add watch rule: Kuzatuv qoidasini qo'shishda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Failed to update watch rule: Kuzatuv qoidasini yangilashda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Failed to remove watch rule: Kuzatuv qoidasini olib tashlashda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Monitor folders for file upload inactivi: Fayl yuklashdagi faolsizliklar uchun papkalarni kuzatib boring va bildirishnomalarni oling.
